# Agent Assets

Place the agent avatar image here as `mkii-avatar.png`.

## Requirements
- **Format:** PNG (preferred) or JPG
- **Size:** Square recommended (e.g., 256x256 or 512x512)
- **File:** `mkii-avatar.png`

## To add an avatar:
1. Upload your image file to this directory
2. Rename it to `mkii-avatar.png`
3. The agent will automatically use it

**Note:** The image path is configured in `.github/agents/ClaudeMKII.agent.md`
